testcase.name: after_bank_transfer_purchase_success_the_checkout_confirmation_stays_generic_and_exposes_no_order_or_receipt_identity
testcase.system-out:
• Playwright pages after init: 1 ▶ Authenticated receipt-identity on-success preconditions ▶ Clear browser session ✅ PASS: Session cleared ✅ PASS: Browser session was cleared before the next receipt-identity on-success check ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/auth/register • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/auth/register • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /auth/register ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Type into element: First name • locator=input[data-test='first-name'] • value=John ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Last name • locator=input[data-test='last-name'] • value=Doe ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Date of Birth • locator=input[data-test='dob'] • value=1990-01-01 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Phone • locator=input[data-test='phone'] • value=0712345678 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Email address • locator=input[data-test='email'] • value=user_ehfdrvt5xc@example.com ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Password • locator=input[data-test='password'] • value=Aa1@pRqJRpoc ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Select option: Country • locator=select[data-test='country'] • value=RO ✅ PASS: Selected ▶ Type into element: Postal code • locator=input[data-test='postal_code'] • value=10001 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: House number • locator=input[data-test='house_number'] • value=5 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Street • locator=input[data-test='street'] • value=Main Street 1 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: City • locator=input[data-test='city'] • value=Bucharest ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: State • locator=input[data-test='state'] • value=B ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Register • locator=button[data-test='register-submit'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/auth/login • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/auth/login • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /auth/login ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Type into element: Email address • locator=input[data-test='email'] • value=user_ehfdrvt5xc@example.com ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Password • locator=input[data-test='password'] • value=Aa1@pRqJRpoc ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Login • locator=input[data-test='login-submit'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/ • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/ • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: / ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Click visible match on: first product card • locator=a[data-test^='product-'] • visibleIndex=1 ✅ PASS: Clicked visible match ▶ Click on: Add to cart • locator=button[data-test='add-to-cart'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Get text from: cart quantity • locator=span[data-test='cart-quantity'] • text= ✅ PASS: Text captured ▶ Get text from: cart quantity • locator=span[data-test='cart-quantity'] • text= ✅ PASS: Text captured ▶ Get text from: cart quantity • locator=span[data-test='cart-quantity'] • text= ✅ PASS: Text captured ▶ Get text from: cart quantity • locator=span[data-test='cart-quantity'] • text=1 ✅ PASS: Text captured ▶ Get text from: cart quantity • locator=span[data-test='cart-quantity'] • text=1 ✅ PASS: Text captured ▶ Click on: Cart • locator=a[data-test='nav-cart'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Click on: Proceed to checkout from cart • locator=button[data-test='proceed-1'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Click on: Proceed as authenticated user • locator=button[data-test='proceed-2'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Select option: Billing country • locator=select[data-test='country'] • value=RO ✅ PASS: Selected ▶ Type into element: Billing postal code • locator=input[data-test='postal_code'] • value=10001 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Billing house number • locator=input[data-test='house_number'] • value=5 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Billing street • locator=input[data-test='street'] • value=Main Street 1 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Billing city • locator=input[data-test='city'] • value=Bucharest ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Billing state • locator=input[data-test='state'] • value=B ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Proceed to payment • locator=button[data-test='proceed-3'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Select option: Payment method • locator=select[data-test='payment-method'] • value=Bank Transfer ✅ PASS: Selected ▶ Type into element: Bank name • locator=input[data-test='bank_name'] • value=Audit Bank ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Account name • locator=input[data-test='account_name'] • value=John Doe ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Account number • locator=input[data-test='account_number'] • value=12345678901234 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Confirm payment • locator=button[data-test='finish'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Get text from: page body • locator=body • text=View the Documentation for this application. Practice Black Box Testing & Bug Hunting Testing Guide 🐛 Bug Hunting Home Categories Contact John Doe 1 EN CART 1 SIGN IN 2 BILLING ADDRESS 3 PAYMENT 4 Payment Payment Method Choose your payment method Bank Transfer Cash on Delivery Credit Card Buy Now Pay Later Gift Card Bank Name Account Name Account Number Please enter your bank account number as it appears on your bank statement. It's a unique series of numbers used to identify your individual account. Avoid including any spaces or hyphens. Payment was successful Confirm
This is a DEMO application (GitHub repo), used for software testing training purpose. | Privacy Policy | Banner photo by Barn Images on Unsplash.
Product added to shopping cart. ✅ PASS: Text captured ▶ Get text from: page body • locator=body • text=View the Documentation for this application. It's a unique series of numbers used to identify your individual account. Avoid including any spaces or hyphens. Payment was successful Confirm
This is a DEMO application (GitHub repo), used for software testing training purpose. | Privacy Policy | Banner photo by Barn Images on Unsplash.
Product added to shopping cart. ✅ PASS: Text captured

testcase.name: after_cod_purchase_success_the_checkout_confirmation_stays_generic_and_exposes_no_order_or_receipt_identity
testcase.system-out:
▶ Authenticated receipt-identity on-success preconditions ▶ Clear browser session ✅ PASS: Session cleared ✅ PASS: Browser session was cleared before the next receipt-identity on-success check ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/auth/login • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/auth/login • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /auth/login ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Type into element: Email address • locator=input[data-test='email'] • value=user_ehfdrvt5xc@example.com ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Password • https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/ • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/ • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: / ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Click visible match country • locator=select[data-test='country'] • value=RO ✅ PASS: Selected ▶ Type into element: Billing postal code • locator=input[data-test='postal_code'] • value=10001 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Billing house number • locator=input[data-test='house_number'] • value=5 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Billing street • locator=input[data-test='street'] • value=Main Street 1 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Billing city • locator=input[data-test='city'] • value=Bucharest ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Billing state • locator=input[data-test='state'] • value=B ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Proceed to payment • locator=button[data-test='proceed-3'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Select option: Payment method • locator=select[data-test='payment-method'] • value=Gift Card ✅ PASS: Selected ▶ Type into element: Gift card number • locator=input[data-test='gift_card_number'] • value=ABCDEFGH12345678 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Validation code • locator=input[data-test='validation_code'] • value=W9X2 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Confirm payment • locator=button[data-test='finish'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Get text from: page body • locator=body • text=View the Documentation for this application. Practice Black Box Testing & Bug Hunting Testing Guide 🐛 Bug Hunting Home Categories Contact John Doe 1 EN CART 1 SIGN IN 2 BILLING ADDRESS 3 PAYMENT 4 Payment Payment Method Choose your payment method Bank Transfer Cash on Delivery Credit Card Buy Now Pay Later Gift Card Gift Card Number Enter the unique number found on your gift card. This number is usually located on the back of the card and consists of 16 letters and/or digits. Validation Code The validation code is a security feature found on your gift card, often located near the gift card number. Enter this 4-character code exactly as it appears on your card. Payment was successful Confirm
This is a DEMO application (GitHub repo), used for software testing training purpose. | Privacy Policy | Banner photo by Barn Images on Unsplash.
Product added to shopping cart. ✅ PASS: Text captured ▶ Get text from: page body • locator=body • text=View the Documentation for this application. This number is usually located on the back of the card and consists of 16 letters and/or digits. Validation Code The validation code is a security feature found on your gift card, often located near the gift card number. Enter this 4-character code exactly as it appears on your card. Payment was successful Confirm

Type into element: Billing city • locator=input[data-test='city'] • value=Bucharest ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Billing state • locator=input[data-test='state'] • value=B ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Proceed to payment • locator=button[data-test='proceed-3'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Select option: Payment method • locator=select[data-test='payment-method'] • value=Gift Card ✅ PASS: Selected ▶ Type into element: Gift card number • locator=input[data-test='gift_card_number'] • value=ZXCVASDF12345678 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Validation code • locator=input[data-test='validation_code'] • value=Q1W2 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Confirm payment • locator=button[data-test='finish'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Get text from: page body • locator=body • text=View the Documentation for this application. Practice Black Box Testing & Bug Hunting Testing Guide 🐛 Bug Hunting Home Categories Contact John Doe 2 EN CART 1 SIGN IN 2 BILLING ADDRESS 3 PAYMENT 4 Payment Payment Method Choose your payment method Bank Transfer Cash on Delivery Credit Card Buy Now Pay Later Gift Card Gift Card Number Enter the unique number found on your gift card. This number is usually located on the back of the card and consists of 16 letters and/or digits. Validation Code The validation code is a security feature found on your gift card, often located near the gift card number. Enter this 4-character code exactly as it appears on your card. Payment was successful Confirm
This is a DEMO application (GitHub repo), used for software testing training purpose. | Privacy Policy | Banner photo by Barn Images on Unsplash.

This number is usually located on the back of the card and consists of 16 letters and/or digits. Validation Code The validation code is a security feature found on your gift card, often located near the gift card number. Enter this 4-character code exactly as it appears on your card.
